## Checklist

- [ ] Title follows [Conventional Commits](https://www.conventionalcommits.org/)
- [ ] `pnpm lint` passes
- [ ] `pnpm typecheck` passes
- [ ] `pnpm test` passes
- [ ] New behavior is covered by tests
- [ ] User-facing strings live in `messages/*.json` (no hardcoded text)
- [ ] Accessibility checked (keyboard nav, contrast, ARIA where needed)
- [ ] If schema changed: migration committed, ADR updated if architecturally significant
- [ ] If a feature was added: `features/<name>/README.md` updated
